
#### Diagram:

{{< include _subfiles/shared/_surv_diagram.qmd >}}

---

#### Identities:

$$
\begin{aligned}
\surv(t) &= 1 - \cdf(t)\\
&= \expf{-\cuhaz(t)}\\
\surv'(t) &= -f(t)\\
\cuhaz(t) &= -\logf{\surv(t)}\\
\cuhaz'(t) &= \haz(t)\\
\haz(t) &= \frac{\pdf(t)}{\surv(t)}\\
&= -\deriv{t}\log{\surv(t)} \\
f(t) &= \haz(t)\cdot \surv(t)\\
\end{aligned}
$$

---

Some proofs (others left as exercises):

$$
\ba
\surv'(t) &= \deriv{t}(1-\cdf(t))\\
&= -\cdf'(t)\\
&= -\pdf(t)\\
\ea
$$

---

$$
\ba
\deriv{t}\logf{\surv(t)}
&= \frac{\surv'(t)}{\surv(t)}\\
&= -\frac{\pdf(t)}{\surv(t)}\\
&= -\haz(t)\\
\ea
$$

---

$$
\ba
\cuhaz(t)
&\eqdef \int_{u=0}^t \haz(u) du\\
&= \int_0^t -\deriv{u}\logf{\surv(u)} du\\
&= \sb{-\logf{\surv(u)}}_{u=0}^{u=t}\\
&= \sb{\logf{\surv(u)}}_{u=t}^{u=0}\\
&= \logf{\surv(0)} - \logf{\surv(t)}\\
&= \logf{1} - \logf{\surv(t)}\\
&= 0 - \logf{\surv(t)}\\
&=-\logf{\surv(t)}
\ea
$$

---

Corollary:

$$\surv(t) = \expf{-\cuhaz(t)}$$

---
